Interface JSDraftDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, JsonSchemaDocument, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
JSDraft4Document, JSDraft6Document, JSDraft7Document
All Known Implementing Classes:
JSDraft4DocumentImpl, JSDraft6DocumentImpl, JSDraft7DocumentImpl
public interface JSDraftDocument extends JsonSchemaDocument
